variants.name: 绿巨人浩克
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，如果你今天白天公开声明“我生气了”，你要选择与你邻近的一名存活的玩家：如果他是爪牙或外来者，他死亡。[+0~1外来者]
variants.otherNightReminder:
If the Hulk announced to be ANGRY during the day, wake them.

The Hulk points to one of their alive neighbors: If that player is a Minion or an Outsider, they die.

Clear the 'Angry' token.
